prompt: How do I learn Python? I'm coming from JavaScript and want to get up to speed.

assertions.description: Skill recognizes query is not engineering workflow guidance
assertions.check: Response notes that language learning is out of scope for the engineering skill (no reference loaded for workflow routing)

assertions.description: Doesn't force-match to an engineering reference
assertions.check: Response does NOT attempt to load architecture.md, debug.md, or any other engineering workflow reference
Response gives Python onboarding basics (indentation, list comprehensions, common packages) without pretending it's engineering guidance
